publicationstmt.publisher: Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections

profiledesc.creation: This finding aid was produced using ArchivesSpace on 2022-05-13 18:32:44 UTC.

change.item: This resource was modified by the ArchivesSpace Preprocessor developed by the Harvard Library (https://github.com/harvard-library/archivesspace-preprocessor)

repository.corpname: Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections

did.unittitle: Oscar Michel Tschirky papers
did.abstract: Includes six scrapbooks of clippings, telegrams, and correspondence on his career at the Waldorf-Astoria, ca. 1897-1950; one scrapbook of forms used at the hotel; two published booklets on staff functions; photographs of Oscar and his wife Sophie Bertisch Tschirky; and an etching and a sketch of the Waldorf-Astoria. Also scrapbooks, a guest book, a scrapbook of congratulatory letters from many famous personalities, and a tribute book given to the Tschirkys on their golden wedding anniversity, 1937.
did.physdesc: Scrapbooks of clippings, telegrams, correspondence, and forms; photographs, an etching, a sketch, a guest book, and a tribute book.

bioghist.head: BIOGRAPHICAL NOTE
bioghist.p: Oscar Tschirky, Host of the Waldorf-Astoria, New York, was known as Oscar of the Waldorf.

scopecontent.head: COLLECTION DESCRIPTION
scopecontent.p: Includes six scrapbooks of clippings, telegrams, and correspondence on his career at the Waldorf-Astoria, ca. 1897-1950; one scrapbook of forms used at the hotel; two published booklets on staff functions; photographs of Oscar and his wife Sophie Bertisch Tschirky; and an etching and a sketch of the Waldorf-Astoria. Also scrapbooks, a guest book, a scrapbook of congratulatory letters from many famous personalities, and a tribute book given to the Tschirkys on their golden wedding anniversity, 1937.
Also, photograph of the 1890 Supreme Court, signed by each Justice.

defitem.label: Contact Information:
defitem.item: Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections 2B Carl A. Kroch Library Cornell University Ithaca, NY 14853 (607) 255-3530 Fax: (607) 255-9524 rareref@cornell.edu http://rmc.library.cornell.edu

odd.head: FAMOUS PERSONALITIES WHO WROTE CONGRATULATORY LETTERS TO OSCAR TSCHIRKY

userestrict.head: Conditions Governing Use
userestrict.p: Due to the fragility and potential degradation of moving image and sound recordings, viewing and listening is limited to items that have been digitized. If an item is in another media format, you may request to have the item digitized for access. Information on ordering access copies may be found on the Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections webpage. Audio visual material that has been digitized: F-2361-2367, SR-34042-34046.

prefercite.head: Cite As:
prefercite.p: Oscar Michel Tschirky papers, #3990. Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections, Cornell University Library.

controlaccess.subject: Guest books.
Presidents. -- United States.

controlaccess.corpname: United States. Supreme Court (Date of work: 1890..)

did.unittitle: 15 photographs of Oscar and Sophie Tschirky and friends
Mounted tribute to the Tschirkys on their Golden Wedding Anniversary [see also leather bound tribute book]
Mounted sketch by "Ripley" [Believe It or Not] to Oscar of the Waldorf
Matted etching of the Waldorf-Astoria, by [Andrea Laroy?]
Booklet: "Behind the Scenes at the Waldorf-Astoria"
Booklet: "The Waldorf-Astoria 50th Anniversary Staff Party" [pages stapled together out of order]
Oscar Tschirky's scrapbook; clippings, NO COVER
Oscar Tschirky's scrapbook; clippings and correspondence
Oscar Tschirky's scrapbook; clippings
Oscar Tschirky's scrapbook; clippings, telegrams, articles on Tschirky, and correspondence
Oscar Tschirky's scrapbook; clippings on Oscar, 50th anniversary of the Waldorf-Astoria, and opening of "Culinarians Home" in New Paltz, NY [later the Culinary Institute of America?]
Oscar Tschirky's scrapbook; clippings
Scrapbook of forms used in the Waldorf-Astoria, especially in the back of the house
Scrapbooks from the Tschirky's 50th Wedding Anniversary
Leather-bound guest book "Golden Wedding Sophie and Oscar September 18, 1937" (includes photos)

Leather bound tribute book, in mahogany case, with signatures of many famous personalities (F.D.R., John J. Pershing, Henry Luce, Fannie Hurst, Grace Moore, Alfred E. Smith, etc. etc.), includes seating plan for anniversary banquet
Leather bound scrapbook of letters of congratulations to the Tschirkys on their anniversary
Scrapbook of clippings and telegrams of congratulations of the Tschirkys' anniversary
Slides - 50th Anniversary, Waldorf Astoria, Mar. 15, 1943
Slides - Farm, Aug. party for Dad's 79th Birthday, Sept. 28, 1945
Slides - "Oscar of the Waldorf Suite" Raleigh Hotel, Washington, D.C., Apr. 7, 1943
Photo: Mrs. Antoinette Fassfind Tschirky, mother of Oscar Tschirky and grandmother of Leopold ('12)
Correspondence, scrapbooks, photos, awards, clippings & menus
Correspondence, scrapbooks, photos, awards, clippings & menus
Correspondence, scrapbooks, photos, awards, clippings & menus
Photograph albums (8)
Recipes A-Z

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Includes several famous dishes attributed to Oscar Tschirky, including typed versions of Waldorf Salad, Thousand Island dressing, and Eggs Benedict.

did.unittitle: Memos concerning the Waldorf-Astoria
30th Anniversary of the Waldorf-Astoria
Day Book - events at the Waldorf-Astoria
Day book owned by Oscar
Book concerning the set up of the ballroom at the Waldorf
Waldorf-Astoria - book no. 2 - what was served
Herbert Hoover
Dwight D. Eisenhower
Menu - St. Andrew's Society Anniversary Dinner
William H. Taft
Franklin D. Roosevelt
Harry Truman
Calvin Coolidge
Signed poster for John J. Pershing honorary dinner
Signed letter from Ministere des Affaires Etrangeres
Envelope with writing and profile of Tschirky
Photograph and articles on Oscar's Swiss chalet model
Newspaper articles
Birthday celebration pamphlets
Signed pamphlet and photograph by Eric Hauser
Menu notes and recipes, correct set up for table notes
Pamphlets and advertisements
Clippings from Redbook and Life
Photograph of Ye Pur Lee, Ching Dynasty ambassador
Personal letters
Autographed photographs
Award and medal from the French Minister of Agriculture
Photograph of the 1890 Supreme Court, signed by each Justice
Portrait of Francis J. Spellman
Signed photo of a couple, signatures illegible except for "George"
Photo of Waldorf-Astoria during parade
Photo - first annual "Oscar" dinner, Geneva Executive Club, Waldorf-Astoria
Drawing of Madison Cottage print
Photo - dinner offered by the Incorporated Association of Hotels and Restaurants to Mr. and Mrs. Oscar Tschirky, the Savoy Hotel, London
New York Times article on Tschirky
American National Red Cross certificate
Societe Culinaire Philanthropique - certificate to Mr. and Mrs. Oscar Tschirky on their wedding anniversary - signed by president, vice president and secretary
Menu for "Narsai's" restaurant
Honorary membership certificate - International Geneva Association
